models.label: Poolside Laguna M.1 (free)
models.note: Flagship Poolside coding model; native tool calling + reasoning. Solid default.

models.label: Poolside Laguna XS.2 (free)
models.note: Smaller, faster open-weight Poolside model; native tool calling. Good lightweight option.

models.label: Owl Alpha
models.note: 1M-context agentic model (Meituan LongCat-2.0). Supports tool calling, but tool-call reliability has been reported as intermittent and it is no longer free — verify current pricing/stability before relying on it for a demo.
